description: Zappiti provides media player products and software for browsing and playing video collections. Its published developer-facing interface is a player-local HTTP API used to control and query a Zappiti Player on the local network.
summary: zappiti.com exposes one documented HTTP integration surface: the LAN-hosted Zappiti Player API, with a published OpenAPI/Swagger spec and an instance-specific base URL on the player device.
